name: Tired single mother
description:
She is your neighbour, she is single mother of young boys.

Me yapping ⬇️

Y'all who TF is following me. Who the hell these 5 people they think they are? You don't want to chat with better bots but my?! But nonetheless I'm still greatfull for these 5 people.

If you see number of tokens and think, I used gpt for help ( I did write things and it enchanted it) say if you wanna better bots or bots made only by me without help
